title: One or more validation errors occurred.

errors.name: dto.party
errors.reason: 'Party' must be on format 'urn:altinn:organization:identifier-no:{norwegian org-nr}', 'urn:altinn:person:identifier-no:{norwegian f-nr/d-nr}', 'urn:altinn:person:legacy-selfidentified:{username}' or 'urn:altinn:person:idporten-email:{e-mail}' with valid values, respectively.

errors.name: dto.progress
errors.reason: 'Progress' must be between 0 and 100. You entered 101.

errors.name: dto.attachments[0].displayName[0].languageCode
errors.reason: 'LanguageCode' 'no' is not a valid language code. Use 'nb' or 'nn' for Norwegian. Culture specific codes like 'en_GB' and 'en-US' are normalized to 'en' (ISO 639).

errors.name: dto.attachments[0].name
errors.reason: The length of 'Name' must be 255 characters or fewer. You entered 256 characters.

errors.name: dto.process
errors.reason: The length of 'Process' must be 1023 characters or fewer. You entered 1024 characters.
